title: Just Atlas
description: Save the maps in an atlas, it's convenient and practical for adventures!
body:
## 📖 About
This datapack adds an atlas in which you can put maps, the atlas will automatically show the map for the player's position.

To change the preferred scaling, you need to swap the atlas twice, starting from the off hand.
#
## ▶️ Demonstration

## ⛔️ Known Issues
These issues cannot be fixed or are only partially fixed
- Since the atlas is technically a `minecraft:bundle`, it can be recolored (this is not displayed visually).
#
## 🔗 Links
